programme.title: Thirst with Shay Mitchell
programme.desc: Actress Shay Mitchell travels the world.In the places he visits, he pays attention to the alcohol served there.He tries the unique ingredients that make up these drinks and discovers the best bars.

programme.title: You Me Malaysia
programme.desc: Famous Malaysians including:actress Diana Danielle, show their beloved country to travelers and bloggers who deal with tourism.

programme.title: You Me Malaysia
programme.desc: Famous Malaysians including:actress Diana Danielle, show their beloved country to travelers and bloggers who deal with tourism.

programme.title: Moonshiners 11
programme.desc: Further adventures of producers of illegal alcohol.The demand for their products is growing, which is why this business is becoming more and more dangerous.To expand production, new helpers are needed.

programme.title: Moonshiners 11
programme.desc: Further adventures of producers of illegal alcohol.The demand for their products is growing, which is why this business is becoming more and more dangerous.To expand production, new helpers are needed.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Kenya, located in East Africa, is inhabited by 55 million people, over 40 different tribes who speak almost 70 languages ​​in total.Although there is a real mosaic of cultures and beliefs there, not everyone is accepted, and being different can even cost your life.Martyna Wojciechowska visits this republic to meet Darlan.She claims to be the first outed intersex person in her country.Today, he is popular, sings, records music videos, designs clothes, and preaches tolerance.However, this was not always the case.A child born with sexual organs different from those typical of a boy or girl may be considered a curse on the community and killed.Darlan's childhood was marked by humiliation, sarcastic remarks, but also attacks and loneliness.Currently he is fighting for "others".The Darlan Rukih Church is one of the 4,000 officially registered in Kenya and has half a million believers.He cares for all those who are rejected.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Sally Mae Hassona grew up in Australia.When she was very young, she started training kickboxing, then football, and in 2012 she became interested in boxing.That's how she got into the amateur league.As a talented player, she won the Golden Gloves Championship.Some time later she became a trainer.Together with her Egyptian husband, they are the parents of two children.They moved to Cairo four years ago.Women's boxing is a completely new phenomenon in this city.Society often cannot accept that women practice this "men's sport".However, Sally Mae Hassona decided to start her own boxing academy: Impact Sports Academy.There he trains girls and boys from poor families.She also hopes that in the future, her students' fighting skills will enable them to defend themselves against violence.Some of Sally's students successfully participate in competitions organized by the federation in Egypt.The woman's children also train, and her son became a boxing champion.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska once again managed to reach the titular "end of the world", despite restrictions, difficulties in traveling, and the fact that the thirteenth series of the program could have been the unlucky one.During the uncertain time of the pandemic, she showed viewers moving stories that gave hope that miracles can be achieved even in the most difficult circumstances.She produced an extraordinary series of stories from Dubai, Georgia, Kenya, Malawi, Egypt and Romania.Now viewers will learn the behind-the-scenes of all these expeditions.For the host of the program, it is also a sentimental journey - one of the heroines of the reports, Raha Moharrak, just like her, reached for the Crown of the Earth, and in the desert in Dubai, Martyna Wojciechowska met her colleagues from the Dakar Rally: Marek Dąbrowski and Jacek Czachor.In Kenya, she appeared in a music video for a gospel song by Darlan Rukish.However, during filming in Malawi, she refused to eat a roasted mouse.This is just some of the information that will appear in the episode.

programme.title: Thirst with Shay Mitchell
programme.desc: Actress Shay Mitchell travels the world.In the places he visits, he pays attention to the alcohol served there.He tries the unique ingredients that make up these drinks and discovers the best bars.

programme.title: Thirst with Shay Mitchell

programme.desc: Further adventures of producers of illegal alcohol.The demand for their products is growing, which is why this business is becoming more and more dangerous.To expand production, new helpers are needed.

programme.title: Moonshiners 11
programme.desc: Further adventures of producers of illegal alcohol.The demand for their products is growing, which is why this business is becoming more and more dangerous.To expand production, new helpers are needed.

programme.title: Man v Food 2
programme.desc: Adam sets off on a journey across the United States to take part in subsequent rounds of timed eating competitions.Adam will take on Badass Burrito in Las Vegas and a 106-centimetre pizza in San Antonio.

programme.title: Mexico Life 3
programme.desc: The creators of the program follow people looking for their perfect home in Mexico.Most of them dream of constant sun, beautiful beaches and water sports.Some people are looking for an entertaining nightlife, while others are looking for the traditional cuisine of the region.There are also many people who want to live in a secluded and quiet place on the coast.Local real estate agents will help them make their choice and find their own place in Mexican paradise.In each episode, specialists will present the characters with numerous offers from the real estate market, both the more expensive ones, but ready to move in, and the cheaper ones, but requiring renovation.

programme.title: Mexico Life 3
programme.desc: The creators of the program follow people looking for their perfect home in Mexico.Most of them dream of constant sun, beautiful beaches and water sports.Some people are looking for an entertaining nightlife, while others are looking for the traditional cuisine of the region.There are also many people who want to live in a secluded and quiet place on the coast.Local real estate agents will help them make their choice and find their own place in Mexican paradise.In each episode, specialists will present the characters with numerous offers from the real estate market, both the more expensive ones, but ready to move in, and the cheaper ones, but requiring renovation.

programme.title: Mexico Life 3
programme.desc: The creators of the program follow people looking for their perfect home in Mexico.Most of them dream of constant sun, beautiful beaches and water sports.Some people are looking for an entertaining nightlife, while others are looking for the traditional cuisine of the region.There are also many people who want to live in a secluded and quiet place on the coast.Local real estate agents will help them make their choice and find their own place in Mexican paradise.In each episode, specialists will present the characters with numerous offers from the real estate market, both the more expensive ones, but ready to move in, and the cheaper ones, but requiring renovation.

programme.title: Mexico Life 3
programme.desc: The creators of the program follow people looking for their perfect home in Mexico.Most of them dream of constant sun, beautiful beaches and water sports.Some people are looking for an entertaining nightlife, while others are looking for the traditional cuisine of the region.There are also many people who want to live in a secluded and quiet place on the coast.Local real estate agents will help them make their choice and find their own place in Mexican paradise.In each episode, specialists will present the characters with numerous offers from the real estate market, both the more expensive ones, but ready to move in, and the cheaper ones, but requiring renovation.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska visits an extraordinary beauty salon located in Lahore, Pakistan.His services are used by women who have suffered acid burns in the past.Dousing and arson attacks affect up to several thousand women every year.A bottle of acid does not cost even a zloty, the substance is easily available, and the attack lasts a few seconds.The traveler talks to Musarrat Misbah, who has already helped over five hundred injured women.It provides victims with proper medical care, reconstructive surgery, psychological care and employment.He gives them jobs in his salon.Viewers will see what the life of the so-calledfaceless women.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska goes to Pakistan, where she meets members of the Kalash tribe.They are the only non-Muslim community in this country, the last descendants of the inhabitants of ancient Kafiristan, who inhabit the lands located on the border of today's Pakistan and Afghanistan.Only about four thousand of them survived.Kalaska women choose their husbands themselves, and when they do not treat them well or the relationship does not work out, they leave to look for a new partner.Free relationships are also allowed among the Kalash, which are prohibited in any other Pakistani community.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska reaches La Paz.Bolivian women have played a primarily reproductive role for centuries.They are caregivers in their families, dependent on men in every aspect of life.If they do not want to comply, they may be beaten.It is in Bolivia that the rate of violence against women remains the highest in all of South America.Meanwhile, some of them decided to fight stereotypes and exchange chef's aprons for crayfish and then conquer the peaks.Martyna Wojciechowska meets such people.They belong to the cholit climbing team from La Paz, led by its founder, Alicia.In this episode, the traveler will also visit Carmen Rojas, the heroine of the first season of the program.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: This time the destination is Belgium, Brussels - the very heart of the European Union.Martyna Wojciechowska manages, among others,to one of the capital's districts, Molenbeek, where he talks to the mothers of jihadists.It turns out that more than five thousand people left the Old Continent, and more than five hundred people left Belgium itself.They all left to fight on the side of the so-called Islamic State.We are talking about young people, women and children.The traveler tries to find out why they decided to join a terrorist organization.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop goes on a trip to the east coast of the United States.He will visit, among others:Ohio, Cleveland, New York, the White House will watch.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places In the California desert, in the middle of nowhere, Magda Wosińska organizes photo sessions of the biggest stars.She has lived in the United States for over thirty years and is currently one of the most respected photographers in the world.Born in Katowice, she started her career by immortalizing the skateboarders and motorcyclists community.Currently, famous actors, musicians and models appear in front of her lens, and the photos themselves are published, among others, on the pages of the New York Times.Magda Wosińska will tell Marcin Prokop how she managed to find herself and fight for her own place in this still male-dominated world.He will share his own thoughts about the Dream Factory.He will confess to which character traits he owes his success.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop sets off overseas once again.According to the stereotype, the United States is a place of endless possibilities, where everyone can fulfill their dreams.In the new season of the program, the host will meet people who have found the recipe for success in life.In this way, he wants to find out whether there is a set of universal rules that guarantee happiness.He will visit, among others, the Skid Row district in Los Angeles, the NASA headquarters in Pasadena, the desert in Utah and a gold mine in Colorado.In each episode, viewers will discover new stories and places.

programme.title: Men, Women, Wild
programme.desc: Three couples, husband and wife, mother and father, and a boy and a girl, set off on an extreme expedition.For three weeks they try to survive in the most dangerous places on the planet.

programme.title: Men, Women, Wild
programme.desc: Three couples, husband and wife, mother and father, and a boy and a girl, set off on an extreme expedition.For three weeks they try to survive in the most dangerous places on the planet.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: The program returns to the air after a break.Over the last few months, Martyna Wojciechowska and her team have traveled all over the world to look for inspiring women who will talk about what is currently most important.For some topics, the host had to wait many years, but for the good stuff, it's definitely worth it.The latest season will bring meetings with the oldest and youngest heroines in the history of the show.Viewers will see episodes shot in eight countries and on five continents.However, it is not about records or the number of kilometers traveled.The most important thing is meeting another person, time spent together, intimate conversation, and the truth about the world This time, Martyna Wojciechowska travels through Asia and Europe, wanting to learn the story of the youngest heroine so far.First, he stops in Hong Kong, where Hanson Robotics is headquartered.The most recognizable humanoid robot - Sophia, was created there.The host follows her to London.He intends to check why the android arouses such extreme emotions.This "woman" has dated Will Smith, sung with Jimmy Fallon, made a speech at the UN meeting, and has been photographed on the covers of numerous magazines.Although it is not the most modern machine in the world, it still causes controversy and provokes discussion regarding artificial intelligence.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: The program returns to the air after a break.Over the last few months, Martyna Wojciechowska and her team have traveled all over the world to look for inspiring women who will talk about what is currently most important.For some topics, the host had to wait many years, but for the good stuff, it's definitely worth it.The latest season will bring meetings with the oldest and youngest heroines in the history of the show.Viewers will see episodes shot in eight countries and on five continents.However, it is not about records or the number of kilometers traveled.The most important thing is meeting another person, time spent together, intimate conversation, and the truth about the world Martyna Wojciechowska visits Canada.Matricia Bauer, who lives in the heart of Jasper National Park in the Rocky Mountains, tells her story.Locals know her as a guide, leader and drum artist.She is a representative of the Kri people.When she was five years old, she was separated from her family as part of a government program called the '60s captive.It involved placing thousands of children from indigenous communities up for adoption by middle-class white families.It was about assimilation with the West.Another example of colonization were boarding schools, where cultural genocide occurred.About 150,000 people lost their childhood there.Frieda, Marticia's mentor, went to one of such places.It proves that even despite tragic experiences, you can find the strength to discover your own identity and then defend it.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: The program returns to the air after a break.Over the last few months, Martyna Wojciechowska and her team have traveled all over the world to look for inspiring women who will talk about what is currently most important.For some topics, the host had to wait many years, but for the good stuff, it's definitely worth it.The latest season will bring meetings with the oldest and youngest heroines in the history of the show.Viewers will see episodes shot in eight countries and on five continents.However, it is not about records or the number of kilometers traveled.The most important thing is meeting another person, time spent together, intimate conversation, and the truth about the world At first glance, Brazil is very open, but in fact it is a country full of contrasts.Violence and macho culture are a brutal everyday reality for many here.For over a decade, it has been at the top of the shameful statistics regarding the murders of transgender people.Over a hundred people die there every year because of transphobia.During her next trip, Martyna Wojciechowska visits Fortaleza, where Lara Nicole lives.She is an activist who opposes the violence prevalent in the world and fights for her own rights and those of other transgender people.She dreams of living to the age of forty, while the average life expectancy of transgender people in Brazil is thirty-five years.Faced with social exclusion, nearly 90% of transgender women have to work on the streets.They remain vulnerable to all forms of violence.For this reason, Lara created Casa Transformar - a safe place for people from the LGBTQ+ community.They can get support.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: The program returns to the air after a break.Over the last few months, Martyna Wojciechowska and her team have traveled all over the world to look for inspiring women who will talk about what is currently most important.For some topics, the host had to wait many years, but for the good stuff, it's definitely worth it.The latest season will bring meetings with the oldest and youngest heroines in the history of the show.Viewers will see episodes shot in eight countries and on five continents.However, it is not about records or the number of kilometers traveled.The most important thing is meeting another person, time spent together, intimate conversation, and the truth about the world This time Martyna goes to Florida, which is Americans' favorite place to spend their retirement.They move there to spend the autumn of their lives walking along the seaside and watching sunsets.However, for the heroines of this episode - Donna and her bandmates - this is definitely not enough.The Calendar Girls group consists of thirty women aged 52 to 82.The women were united by their passion for dance and physical activity.They meet for training several times a week and take part in almost 200 performances a year.With their colorful and joyful repertoire, they entertain residents of retirement homes and financially support the training of guide dogs.The heroines of the episode prove that old age is joy.

programme.title: Man v Food 2
programme.desc: Adam sets off on a journey across the United States to take part in subsequent rounds of timed eating competitions.Adam will take on Badass Burrito in Las Vegas and a 106-centimetre pizza in San Antonio.

programme.title: The Extraordinary States of Procopius
programme.desc: Las Vegas, known as America's playground, attracts crowds of tourists eager for entertainment and nightlife.This city full of neon lights, casinos and concerts is also a place where many people find employment.Marcin Prokop goes to Nevada to look at the lives of employees behind the scenes.He meets Nicole, whose dream is to become an erotic dancer in one of the clubs.After her stay in Barcelona, ​​she returns to Las Vegas to start her career.The host also talks to Internet creator Steve, who describes the everyday life of the city and the threats that may await people here.

programme.title: By truck across the United States
programme.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity and combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.

programme.title: By truck across the United States
programme.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity and combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.

programme.title: By truck across the United States
programme.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity and combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.
